title: Accurate Salmon Variation
description: Salmon spawned oceans will use the a salmon texture that reflects real life salmon in oceans, while river salmon use their vanilla texture
body:
Salmon spawned in non-river biomes will use the a salmon texture that reflects real life salmon in their ocean phase, while salmon that spawn in rivers will use the default vanilla texture for salmon, which reflects the spawning stage of salmon

[Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) is required for the texture pack to work correctly.
